TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tgleq, title = Tgleq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tgleq} }

S.FORM: lalu qalang mu ga Tgleq (Teliq, 鐵立庫部落), imi nya ga htagan na qsya aring gwagiq muci ke niya. cyux maki te Toyen keng pyasan na gogan (cobeh qalang Tayax na sincik), kinwagyq nya ga 1000-1500 meta. kayal nya krryax ga 21-23 kinhyaq nya. Aring cyama ru pwah sanmin mlu basu lga thoyay tehok qalang myan la. qalang Tgleq ru qalang Barung ga tmuhi qbirux kwara myan, pinmuhi myan qbirux ga hupa ru sbing balay, szyon balay muwah mkan okyak kahun hogan, bagan ga yasa qu pyang balay lmwan bway na qbirux. pyang blaq balay ga mwah simu qalang Tgriq ga maras simu nanak torak ga blaq, gi yaqih ngon basu nya kya. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 92 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tgleq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tgleq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tgleq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tgleq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tgleq hya' ga Saruc. tay 'llaw na Tgleq hya' ga Tqwiy. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

lalu qalang mu ga Tgleq (Teliq, 鐵立庫部落), imi nya ga htagan na qsya aring gwagiq muci ke niya. cyux maki te Toyen keng pyasan na gogan (cobeh qalang Tayax na sincik), kinwagyq nya ga 1000-1500 meta. kayal nya krryax ga 21-23 kinhyaq nya. Aring cyama ru pwah sanmin mlu basu lga thoyay tehok qalang myan la. qalang Tgleq ru qalang Barung ga tmuhi qbirux kwara myan, pinmuhi myan qbirux ga hupa ru sbing balay, szyon balay muwah mkan okyak kahun hogan, bagan ga yasa qu pyang balay lmwan bway na qbirux. pyang blaq balay ga mwah simu qalang Tgriq ga maras simu nanak torak ga blaq, gi yaqih ngon basu nya kya. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 92 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tgleq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tgleq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tgleq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tgleq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tgleq hya' ga Saruc. tay 'llaw na Tgleq hya' ga Tqwiy. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: lalu qalaŋ mu ɣa tɣleq (teliq, *****), imi nja ɣa ħtaɣan na qs~ɕja ariŋ ɣwaɣiq muʦ~ʨi ke nija. ʦ~ʨjux maki te tojen keŋ pjas~ɕan na ɣoɣan (ʦ~ʨoβeħ qalaŋ tajax na s~ɕinʦ~ʨik), kinwaɣjq nja ɣa ****-**** meta. kajal nja krrjax ɣa **-** kinħjaq nja. ariŋ ʦ~ʨjama ru pwaħ s~ɕanmin mlu βas~ɕu lɣa tħojaj teħok qalaŋ mjan la. qalaŋ tɣleq ru qalaŋ βaruŋ ɣa tmuħi qβirux kwara mjan, pinmuħi mjan qβirux ɣa ħupa ru s~ɕβiŋ βalaj, s~ɕzjon βalaj muwaħ mkan okjak kaħun ħoɣan, βaɣan ɣa jas~ɕa qu pjaŋ βalaj lmwan βwaj na qβirux. pjaŋ βlaq βalaj ɣa mwaħ s~ɕimu qalaŋ tɣriq ɣa maras~ɕ s~ɕimu nanak torak ɣa βlaq, ɣi jaqiħ ŋon βas~ɕu nja kja. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tɣleq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na tɣleq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tɣleq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na tɣleq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tɣleq ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ. taj ʔllaw na tɣleq ħjaʔ ɣa tqwij. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
